444 N3A N3A_OWN_ROOM (N3A) Prefers Own Room CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: preferred activity settings - own room. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
445 N3B N3B_ACTIVITY_RM (N3B) Prefers Day/Activity Room CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: preferred activity settings
